paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a two-stage hierarchical model where a prior generates CLIP image embeddings from text, and a decoder generates images from those embeddings, enabling semantic manipulation and improved diversity while preserving photorealism
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CLIP image and text pairs from DALL-E and CLIP datasets
raw_extraction.application: Text-to-image generation, image editing, semantic manipulation, interpolation between images
raw_extraction.research_problem: Text-conditional image generation with diverse and semantically consistent outputs
raw_extraction.extension: Uses diffusion models in latent space for efficient and high-quality image generation, with explicit control over image semantics via CLIP embeddings
raw_extraction.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
